TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ernie_Beck, title = Ernie_Beck, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ernie_Beck} }

S.FORM: Ernie Beck nilacul nalecuh ciniza i Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Ernie Beck i 1953 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia Warriors putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 12 a bulad 11 a demiad, 1931 a mihcaan, Ernie Beck, u miunduay a kawaw.
S.PHON: …ôrni…ô b…ô ¶k nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß ¶iniza i pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia, p…ônnsjr~…æ*ania, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôrni…ô b…ô ¶k i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia warriors putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i ** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, …ôrni…ô b…ô ¶k, u miunduaj a kawaw.
S.FORM: Ernie Beck nilacul nalecuh ciniza i Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Ernie Beck i 1953 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia Warriors putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 12 a bulad 11 a demiad, 1931 a mihcaan, Ernie Beck, u miunduay a kawaw.
